getBlockMeter().details: If storage still contains a previous block meter, returns `(block.number, 0)`.

returns._0: string Name and the version of the contract.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

addToBlockHCUWhitelist(address).notice: Adds one caller to the block-cap whitelist.

checkHCUForFheShl(uint8,bytes1,bytes32,b.notice: Check the homomorphic complexity units limit for FheShl.

checkHCUForFheShr(uint8,bytes1,bytes32,b.notice: Check the homomorphic complexity units limit for FheShr.

checkHCUForFheSub(uint8,bytes1,bytes32,b.notice: Check the homomorphic complexity units limit for FheSub.

checkHCUForIfThenElse(uint8,bytes32,byte.notice: Check the homomorphic complexity units limit for IfThenElse.

checkHCUForTrivialEncrypt(uint8,bytes32,.notice: Check the homomorphic complexity units limit for TrivialEncrypt.

getBlockMeter().notice: Returns the effective public block HCU meter for the current block.

getFHEVMExecutorAddress().notice: Getter function for the FHEVMExecutor contract address.

getGlobalHCUCapPerBlock().notice: Returns the global block HCU cap.

getMaxHCUDepthPerTx().notice: Returns the per-transaction HCU depth limit.

getVersion().notice: Getter for the name and version of the contract.

isBlockHCUWhitelisted(address).notice: Returns whether a caller bypasses the global block HCU cap.

removeFromBlockHCUWhitelist(address).notice: Removes one caller from the block-cap whitelist.

setHCUPerBlock(uint48).notice: Sets the block-level HCU limit for non-whitelisted callers.

setMaxHCUDepthPerTx(uint48).notice: Sets the per-transaction HCU depth limit.
